text_block_list.text:
It's school orientation today, and we've been
assigned to show Umamusume children around as
a group.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hi, everyone! We're going to make sure you have
tons of fun at Tracen Academy today, okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And you, Trainer! Do your best as our manager
today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right. Without further ado, let's begin
Operation Runaway ☆ Attendants! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Operation Runaway ☆ Attendants. Understood.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's with the weird name?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is the training gym. Commencing training
demonstration.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow, amazing! She's so muscular!
Let's try too! Wheee!♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Bourbon is special! Don't try to copy her!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This track is huge!
Leeeeet's... gooo!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, wait! Everyone! Don't just start running!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... They've all got so much energy...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: There is still data we have yet to share with them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'm not sure we've done a good job of
showing them what makes Tracen such a special
place...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! In that case, let's show them an
amazing concert! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The sparkling figure of an Umadol will hold the
attention of even the most hyper little kids!
choice_data_list: You should sing a song from an anime!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay! ☆ I've got plenty of anime songs in my
repertoire. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Follow my lead, you two! ☆ ♪♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... I know this song. Next is... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Song understood. Beginning chorus... ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Everyone, join in! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text:
You're so cute, Falco!
Sing it again!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It looks like they're all much more engaged now.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's sing it one more time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... But what about introducing the academy?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's give them some fun memories first! ☆ Okay,
let's go! ☆

And so, Smart Falcon wins over the children and
successfully introduces them to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that magical girl anime all the kids are into,
right? ☆ I'm sure they'll all love that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So, you show yourself at last, Trainer! Or should I say... evil minion!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Magical ☆ Miracle ☆ Make Debut! Let's change
the baddie's heart with a song! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Lalaaa... Lala. ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Lalaaa... ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Lalaaa... ♪
Everyone join in! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Lala. ♪ Lalala... ♪ Lala. ♪ Lalala... ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, let's make the world peaceful with the
moving power of races and concerts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪ Hey, Falco! Sing it again!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay! ☆ Then why don't we sing it while we walk
around the academy? ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪

And so, the children's singing voices echo through
campus as they tour the academy.
